text: Standing here, I am struck by the sterile brightness and reflective surfaces, which make me feel a sense of detachment and observation—as though I am both inside and outside the scene. The presence of technology and design suggests innovation, yet the empty chairs and stark lines evoke a kind of anticipation, as if something important is about to happen or be revealed. I feel curious and slightly self-aware, as if I am here to learn not just from the environment but from my own reactions to it.
